title: Artanthe lessertiana
intro: Artanthe lessertiana, also known as the Lesser's Artanthe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various conditions such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues. Bioactive constituents of Artanthe lessertiana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Artanthe lessertiana is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat fever, coughs, and sore throats, as well as to support immune function and overall well-being.
